name: ASRock Z790 LIGHTNING WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - Support DDR5-7600+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - eDP 1.4 - Intel Killer 2.5G LAN - Killer 802.11ax WiFi 6E
shortName: ASRock Z790 LIGHTNING WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x
description: ATX gaming motherboard for Intel 12th/13th gen with Z790 chipset and PCIe 5.0 support.

specs.pcie_slots: 1x PCIe 5.0 x16, 1x PCIe 4.0 x16, 2x PCIe 3.0 x1
